channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Obama-era prosecutor's probe into blue state police racial bias claims called 'untenable' for troopers
item.description: New Jersey Attorney General Matthew Platkin has ordered a special counsel probe into state police after a slowdown in traffic stops reportedly led to more crashes.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Israeli father says even in Hamas captivity, his daughter heard his pleas to come home alive
item.description: RAMAT GAN, Israel (AP) — For more than 470 days, Eitan Gonen publicly pleaded with his daughter to stay alive while in Hamas captivity. He didn't know if she would hear him, but he ended every interview he gave with the same hopeful message: Romi is coming home alive.
item.dc:creator: SAM MEDNICK, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Flawed emergency alert systems lagged when residents needed them most during Los Angeles wildfires
item.description: When disaster strikes, government emergency alert systems offer a simple promise: Residents will get information about nearby dangers and instructions to help them stay safe.
item.dc:creator: Christopher L. Keller, Claudia Lauer, Amy Taxin And Rebecca Boone, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Nevada will provide U.S. Capitol Christmas Tree for the first time
item.description: Nevada will be front and center this year as it provides the U.S. Capitol Christmas Tree for the first time ever.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Woman arrested at O'Hare with at least $238,000 worth of cocaine in wheelchair
item.description: A woman was arrested at Chicago O'Hare International Airport after being found with at least $238,000 worth of cocaine in her wheelchair.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, NewsNation

item.title: Man busted with 15 pounds of meth, 13 pounds of cocaine in Florida: Deputies
item.description: A search warrant on his Volusia County home revealed cash and packaging consistent with narcotics trafficking.
item.dc:creator: Sara Filips, NewsNation

item.title: US education agency investigating Denver schools over all-gender bathroom
item.description: DENVER (AP) — The U.S. Education Department said Tuesday it was investigating Denver Public Schools for alleged discrimination after the district converted a girl’s restroom on the second floor of a high school into an all-gender restroom while leaving another bathroom exclusive to boys.
item.dc:creator: JESSE BEDAYN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New Homeland Security secretary joins federal agents to tout immigrant arrests in NYC
item.description: Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem joined federal agents Tuesday in New York City to announce the arrests of immigrants wanted on criminal charges, including a man accused of kidnapping who was seen on a viral video entering a Colorado apartment with reputed gang members.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Firings, freezes and layoffs: A look at Trump's moves against federal employees and programs
item.description: CHAPIN, S.C. (AP) — Changeover among federal government agencies is normal when a new administration comes to Washington, with presidents regularly dismissing appointees selected by predecessors from opposing political parties.
item.dc:creator: MEG KINNARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Drunk NYC man pummels taxi driver, steals cab before crashing into parked car during fight over fare: police
item.description: A New York City man allegedly assaulted a cab driver Monday and then stole his cab to go for a joyride that ended in a crash miles away.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Study says climate change made conditions that fed California wildfires more likely, more intense
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Human-caused climate change increased the likelihood and intensity of the hot, dry and windy conditions that fanned the flames of the recent devastating Southern California wildfires, a scientific study found.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: California water regulators deny Trump's claim that US military 'turned on the water' in the state
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California water officials said this week there's no truth to President Donald Trump's assertion that the U.S. military has entered California and “turned on the water.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIE AUSTIN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: These are the most romantic restaurants in the US, according to OpenTable
item.description: (NEXSTAR) - Valentine's Day is just around the corner and finding the perfect restaurant to take the one you love can always be challenging.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, Fox 5

item.title: Federal judge temporarily blocks Trump admin's freeze on federal grants, loans
item.description: A federal judge has temporarily blocked a Trump administration freeze on federal grants and loans that could total trillions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Federal judge temporarily blocks Trump administration freeze on federal grants and loans
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — A federal judge has temporarily blocked a Trump administration freeze on federal grants and loans that could total trillions of dollars. U.S. District Judge Loren L. AliKhan blocked the action Tuesday afternoon, minutes before it was set to go into effect.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Gwyneth Paltrow's LA home sells for $22M
item.description: Paltrow and her ex-husband, Coldplay singer Chris Martin, purchased the 1950s single-story home for $9.95 million in 2012.
item.dc:creator: Patrick Djordjevic, NewsNation

item.title: Watch a miles-long cluster of dolphins captured on drone video
item.description: A miles-long cluster of dolphins has been filmed leaping and gliding across Carmel Bay off the central coast of California, forming an unusual “super pod” of more than 1,500 of the marine creatures.
item.dc:creator: HALLIE GOLDEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Massachusetts teen battling in court over T-shirt thrilled with Trump's 'only two genders' policy
item.description: Massachusetts teen Liam Morrison, who is fighting a legal battle against his school district, hopes President Trump's declaration that "there are only two genders" will help his case.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: 5 takeaways from the first Trump White House briefing
item.description: President Trump’s press secretary Karoline Leavitt held her first White House briefing Tuesday, fielding questions from reporters for just more than 45 minutes.
item.dc:creator: Alex Gangitano, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago's 'sanctuary city' status under investigation by feds
item.description: Chicago and other cities like it — notably Denver, New York and Boston, all of which hold sanctuary city status like Chicago — are being investigated by the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.
item.dc:creator: Ethan Illers, NewsNation

item.title: Oklahoma proposal requires parents to provide immigration status when enrolling students
item.description: OKLAHOMA CITY (AP) — Parents enrolling children in Oklahoma public schools will be required to provide proof of their child’s U.S. citizenship or legal immigration status under a proposed rule approved Tuesday by the State Board of Education.
item.dc:creator: SEAN MURPHY, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Sean Duffy is confirmed by the Senate to lead the Transportation Department
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Sean Duffy was confirmed Tuesday as transportation secretary, giving him a key role in helping President Donald Trump cut regulations and fix the nation's infrastructure. The former Wisconsin congressman has promised safer Boeing planes, less regulation and help for U.S.
item.dc:creator: BERNARD CONDON, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Republican-led states call on Costco to drop DEI
item.description: “Costco should 'do the right thing' by following the law and repealing its DEI policies,” the letter concludes.
item.dc:creator: Cheyanne M. Daniels, NewsNation

item.title: Coca-Cola launches new Orange Cream flavor
item.description: A year after the launch of the short-lived Coca-Cola Spiced, Coke is adding another new flavor to its lineup.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Shooting at Indiana grocery store leaves 3 dead, including the suspect, and 2 officers wounded
item.description: When police “engaged” the shooting suspect outside the store, two officers were wounded and the suspect was fatally shot, according to the Elkhart Police Department.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: American Airlines worker struck, killed by vehicle at Charlotte Airport
item.description: A worker at Charlotte Douglas International Airport (CLT) died Monday after being struck by an airline ramp vehicle on the tarmac, local police have confirmed.
item.dc:creator: Abby Mittower, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Family, friends of Gabby Petito share details surrounding her death in upcoming Netflix documentary
item.description: An upcoming Netflix documentary will shed new light on the story of Gabby Petito and her death at the hands of her fiancé, Brian Laundrie.
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Rain douses wildfires in Southern California without causing serious mudslides
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The first significant storm of the season brought snow and downpours to Southern California that doused wildfires and caused some ash and mud to flow across streets in the Los Angeles area on Monday.
item.dc:creator: CHRISTOPHER WEBER, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: CDC ordered to stop working with WHO immediately, upending expectations of an extended withdrawal
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — U.S. public health officials have been told to stop working with the World Health Organization, effective immediately. A U.S.
item.dc:creator: MIKE STOBBE, Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: 3.8 magnitude earthquake in Maine felt in Massachusetts, Rhode Island
item.description: A Ware, Massachusetts, resident said she was home and her whole house was shaking for about 10 seconds from what she at first believed was an 18-wheeler coming down Route 9.
item.dc:creator: Emma McCorkindale, KRON4

item.title: Super Bowl footballs are ready to go within hours of the matchup being set
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action. The factory in the rural village of Ada, Ohio, makes the game balls used by every NFL team along with many of the nation’s top college programs and high schools.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Trump to sign executive order banning transgender people from military service
item.description: A fact sheet for Monday’s executive order refers to transgender Americans as “trans-identifying,” a technical term used by some to delegitimize transgender identities.
item.dc:creator: Brooke Migdon, WGN 9
